title: Desalination Control System Integration
entry_mechanism: Saudi system integrator certified by Siemens and Honeywell for desalination control systems
executive_summary:
Desalination plant control systems — the SCADA (Supervisory Control and Data Acquisition) and DCS (Distributed Control Systems) that manage the complex interplay of pumps, membranes, chemical dosing, and water quality monitoring in a modern desalination plant — are installed, commissioned, and maintained almost entirely by foreign system integrators. Saudi Arabia operates the world's largest desalination capacity, and control system integration represents $100–150 million in annual services that currently flow to foreign companies.

Node DT-3 targets Saudi-qualified desalination control system integrators: companies certified by Siemens, Honeywell, Yokogawa, and Emerson to design, install, commission, and maintain SCADA and DCS systems in Saudi desalination plants. The certification pathway is accessible — these OEMs have established system integrator programmes internationally.

The system integration value-add is significant: integration services represent 20–30% of the total control system installation cost. A Saudi-qualified integrator retains this value in-Kingdom, creates high-skill engineering jobs, and builds the automation engineering capability that underpins Saudi Arabia's broader industrial digitalisation ambition.

companies.name: Siemens Process Automation
companies.rationale: Siemens supplies DCS to Saudi desalination plants and has Certified System Integrator programme.
companies.contact: Siemens Process Industries VP Saudi Arabia

companies.name: Honeywell Process Solutions
companies.rationale: Honeywell is the leading SCADA/DCS provider for Saudi Water Company desalination plants. Honeywell System Integrator certification programme.
companies.contact: Honeywell Process Solutions VP Saudi Arabia

companies.name: Yokogawa Electric
companies.rationale: Yokogawa supplies control systems to Gulf desalination plants and has system integrator certification.

companies.name: Emerson Automation Solutions
companies.rationale: Emerson has active Saudi Arabia desalination and petrochemical control system deployments.
companies.contact: Emerson VP Process Control, Saudi Arabia

companies.name: ABB Process Automation
companies.rationale: ABB supplies SCADA for water utilities and has Saudi Arabia government water relationships.
companies.contact: ABB VP Process Automation, Middle East
